current_run.problem_name: Hidden Cyclic XOR of Adjacent Products
current_run.description: This problem seeks to find a secret N-bit integer 's' where the oracle computes f(x) = (x XOR (x << 1)) & s, and then XORs the result with the XOR sum of adjacent bits of x. Specifically, f(x) = ((x XOR (x << 1)) & s) XOR (popcount(x ^ (x >> 1)) mod 2). We are given f(x) for various x and need to find s.
